summary: Fix HIGH: README.md install script description and .elcs-ref references in 4 bootstrap files

resolution.details: H1: Updated README.md lines 127-130 — replaced stale .elcs-ref/ install description with accurate elcs/ directory description. H2: Replaced section 1.5 in all 4 bootstrap files (template/AGENTS.md, template/CLAUDE.md, template/.cursorrules, template/.windsurfrules) — removed all .elcs-ref/ references, updated to elcs/ paths with expanded guidance including state check, references folder, and skip-Step-2 logic.
